title: [CODEREVIEW-6] Undefined LICHEN_POE config in defconfig
description: lichen/boards/elecrow/thinknode_m7/Kconfig.defconfig:9 - config LICHEN_POE not declared in any Kconfig (unlike LICHEN_HAS_PMIC in subsys/lichen/hal/Kconfig:58). DTS uses pmic0 alias for poe0 and board Kconfig selects LICHEN_HAS_PMIC. Remove or define properly. P2 correctness.
